pr.title: workloadccl: retry fixture table imports on node liveness errors
pr.body:
When importing workload fixtures, individual table imports could fail
with "node liveness error: restarting in background" if the node
running the import job went down. This error is transient — the jobs
framework automatically restarts the job on another node — but the
client-side SQL query returns an error, causing the entire fixture
import to fail.

Add retry logic with exponential backoff (30s initial, 5min max, up
to 3 retries) around individual table imports in ImportFixture. When
a node liveness error is detected, the import for that specific table
is retried after a backoff period, allowing the fixture import to
succeed without restarting the entire workload command.

Resolves: #149947
Epic: none

Release note: None
